sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103917" key="tiqaseu/twr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τῐθᾰσ-εύτωρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τιθασευτής</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:543" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.543</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
